etymology.description: Phonetic 十 (needle) + semantic 口 (mouth) -> container with a needle symbolizing an ancient pronunciation
etymology.interpretation: The character 由(yóu, 'cause') depicts a container with a top resembling a needle (十), phonetic for sound with 口 (mouth) for semantic influence, symbolizing something that originates from a cause, just as contents originate from a container.

examples.chinese: 这个问题由他负责(這個問題由他負責)。
examples.english: This issue is caused by him to be responsible.

examples.chinese: 一切的变化都是由时间引起的(一切的變化都是由時間引起的)。
examples.pinyin: Yīqiè de biànhuà dōu shì yóu shíjiān yǐnqǐ de.
examples.english: All changes are caused by the passage of time.

examples.chinese: 胜利由努力而来(勝利由努力而來)。
